title: Modern Gray L-Shaped Sectional Sofa
description: Spacious L-shaped sectional sofa in premium gray fabric. Comfortable high-density foam cushions, sturdy wooden frame. Seats 5-6 people. Perfect for living rooms and family areas.

title: Walnut Dining Table Set with 6 Chairs
description: Elegant solid wood dining table set in walnut finish with 6 matching chairs. Seats 6 comfortably. Sturdy construction, scratch-resistant surface. Perfect for family dining.

title: King Size Upholstered Bed Frame - Beige
description: Luxurious king size bed frame upholstered in beige fabric with elegant tufted headboard. Sturdy wooden slat support, no box spring needed. Modern bedroom centerpiece.

title: Modern White TV Stand Entertainment Center
description: Sleek white TV stand with open shelves and closed drawers. Fits TVs up to 65 inches. Cable management system, adjustable shelves. Contemporary living room furniture.

title: 5-Tier Oak Wood Bookshelf
description: Beautiful 5-tier bookshelf in oak finish. Spacious shelves for books, decor, and collectibles. Sturdy construction with anti-tip wall anchor. Home office or living room essential.

title: Modern Home Office Desk with Drawers
description: Stylish home office desk in white and wood finish with built-in drawers. Spacious work surface, cable management hole. Ergonomic design for productive work-from-home setup.

title: Emerald Green Velvet Accent Armchair
description: Stunning emerald green velvet accent armchair with elegant gold legs. Comfortable padded seat and backrest. A statement piece for living rooms, bedrooms, or reading nooks.

title: Large Wardrobe with Mirror Doors
description: Spacious wooden wardrobe in dark brown finish with full-length mirror doors. Multiple shelves, hanging rail, and drawers. Ample storage for all your clothing and accessories.

title: Round Marble Top Coffee Table
description: Elegant round coffee table with genuine marble top and gold metal legs. A luxurious centerpiece for any living room. Durable, easy to clean, and timeless design.

title: Kids White Bunk Bed with Storage
description: Safe and sturdy white bunk bed with ladder, safety rails, and built-in storage drawers. Twin over twin size. Perfect for siblings sharing a room. Easy assembly.
